description: Update an existing user defined ACL rule on a site.

schema.name: name
schema.description: ACL rule name

schema.name: description
schema.description: ACL rule description

schema.name: action
schema.description: ACL rule action

schema.name: enforcingDeviceFilter
schema.description: IDs of the Switch-capable devices used to enforce the ACL rule. When null, the rule will be provisioned to all switches on the site.

schema.name: deviceIds
schema.description: List of Switch capable device IDs to which the ACL rule will be provisioned.

children.name: deviceIds
children.description: List of Switch capable device IDs to which the ACL rule will be provisioned.

schema.name: index
schema.description: ACL rule index. This property is deprecated and has no effect. Use the dedicated ACL rule reordering endpoint.

schema.name: sourceFilter
schema.description: Traffic source filter

schema.name: ipAddressesOrSubnets
schema.description: IP addresses or subnets

schema.name: portFilter
schema.description: Ports this ACL rule will be applied to. If null, all the rule will be applied to all ports.

schema.name: networkIds
schema.description: Network IDs

schema.name: portFilter
schema.description: Ports this ACL rule will be applied to. If null, the rule will be applied to all ports.

schema.name: portFilter
schema.description: Ports this ACL rule will be applied to.

children.name: portFilter
children.description: Ports this ACL rule will be applied to. If null, all the rule will be applied to all ports.

schema.name: destinationFilter
schema.description: Traffic destination filter

schema.name: protocolFilter
schema.description: Protocols this ACL rule will be applied to. When null, the rule will be applied to all protocols.

fields.name: enforcingDeviceFilter
fields.description: IDs of the Switch-capable devices used to enforce the ACL rule. When null, the rule will be provisioned to all switches on the site.

children.name: deviceIds
children.description: List of Switch capable device IDs to which the ACL rule will be provisioned.

fields.name: index
fields.description: ACL rule index. Lower index has higher priority

fields.name: metadata
fields.type: object (User defined or derived entity metadata)
fields.description: Only user-defined rules can be deleted or modified

fields.name: protocolFilter
fields.description: Protocols this ACL rule will be applied to. When null, the rule will be applied to all protocols.

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = json.dumps({
  "type": "string",
  "enabled": True,
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "action": "ALLOW|BLOCK",
  "enforcingDeviceFilter": {
    "type": "string"
  },
  "index": 0
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("PUT", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/{aclRuleId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Update ACL Rule
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/{aclRuleId}"
    method: PUT
    body:
      type: string
      enabled: true
      name: string
      description: string
      action: ALLOW|BLOCK
      enforcingDeviceFilter:
        type: string
      index: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "type": "string",
  "enabled": True,
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "action": "ALLOW|BLOCK",
  "enforcingDeviceFilter": {
    "type": "string"
  },
  "index": 0
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("PUT", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/{aclRuleId}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Update ACL Rule
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/acl-rules/{aclRuleId}"
    method: PUT
    body:
      type: string
      enabled: true
      name: string
      description: string
      action: ALLOW|BLOCK
      enforcingDeviceFilter:
        type: string
      index: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
